Localization.Description: A configuration file was modified from an untrusted host on a device

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A configuration file was modified from untrusted host {src.ip} on device {event_src.host}
A configuration file was modified from an untrusted host on device {event_src.host}
A configuration file was copied via TFTP to an untrusted host from device {event_src.host}
